prerequisites: A k6 Cloud account, now part of Grafana Cloud (Grafana Cloud k6 / Performance testing).
A k6 Cloud API token (personal API token), generated from the Grafana Cloud Performance settings under Access.
The api_token config field (required, secret) to authenticate the connector against the k6 Cloud REST API.

authMethods.name: API Token
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a single k6 Cloud API token, supplied via the connector's required secret field api_token. The token is sent in the HTTP Authorization header. The deprecated k6 Cloud REST API uses the format 'Authorization: token <api_token>'; the current Grafana Cloud k6 REST API uses 'Authorization: Bearer <api_token>'. k6 API tokens do not have an expiration date and must be rotated manually.

setupSteps.title: Sign in to k6 Cloud (Grafana Cloud)
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Grafana Cloud account and open a stack. k6 Cloud is provided through Grafana Cloud's Testing and synthetics / Performance area.

setupSteps.title: Generate a personal API token
setupSteps.body: In the stack, go to Testing & synthetics > Performance > Settings. Under Access, select Personal token and copy the token. This personal API token provides API access to your k6 account. k6 API tokens have no expiration date and must be rotated manually.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the required api_token config field to the copied token. The connector uses it as the secret credential to authenticate REST API requests to k6 Cloud.
